free_text: Structure of 113In studied via the reactions
115In(p,t) 113In, 112Cd(3He,d)113In, and
112Cd(4He,t)113In
Reaction products were analyzed and recorded
with a magnetic spectrograph having a spark counter
at its focal plane.
Both natural In and enriched 115In targets were used,
50 to 150 mu-g/cm thick, on carbon backings. Natural
Cd and enriched 112Cd were used on carbon backings.
All targets were made by vacuum evaporation.
Distorted-wave Born-approximation
analysis was used to interpret the reaction results.
Results of particle-core and hole-core
model calculations are consistent with the observed
spectroscopic factors and with the proposed level
scheme.
